blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,913 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 64°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
